label: Transparent turquoise stone motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Turquoise transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a turquoise stone motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural rough turquoise stone specimen from a desert mine, vivid turquoise-blue mineral body with brown matrix veining, sandy tan crust at the base, subtle polished facets and raw chipped edges, mineral inclusions, dry desert provenance, crisp silhouette. Geological accuracy and premium desert identity system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full stone without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry setting, no beads, no necklace, no hand, no desert landscape, no other stones dominating, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Turquoise light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Turquoise", derived from a turquoise stone cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible desert identity system.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Turquoise, Turquoise Stone, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from vivid turquoise-blue stone, brown matrix veins, sandy mine dust, sunlit pale stone highlights, dry desert shadows, and chipped mineral edges. The board must read as turquoise stone from a desert mine, not tropical water or generic teal SaaS.
Palette to use consistently: Desert Chalk #fbf8ef, Mine Charcoal #23211c, Turquoise Blue #1aa6a8, Matrix Brown #7b5433, Sand Wash #e1c68e, Oxidized Teal #0f6f73, Pale Vein #d9eee9, Dust Sage #7f8f78, Deep Copper #4a3020.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: grounded desert identity system, 8px radius, turquoise primary actions, sand-wash surfaces, matrix-brown borders, pale-vein highlights, restrained grid, subtle cracked-stone texture and small mine-map line accents.
Constraints: no ocean, no tropical resort, no jewelry product page, no generic blue gradients, no neon cyan, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Turquoise", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Turquoise dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Turquoise". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a turquoise stone cutout from a desert mine.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Turquoise, Turquoise Stone, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve turquoise-blue active states, matrix-brown veining, sandy highlights, mine-charcoal surfaces, pale-vein text, cracked mineral dividers, desert-mine texture, grounded spacing, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as turquoise stone, not ocean teal or generic dark SaaS.
Palette to use consistently: Mine Charcoal #23211c, Night Mine #171512, Deep Copper #4a3020, Matrix Brown #7b5433, Turquoise Blue #1aa6a8, Oxidized Teal #0f6f73, Pale Vein #d9eee9, Sand Wash #e1c68e, Dust Sage #7f8f78.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: mine-charcoal dark backgrounds, deep-copper cards, pale-vein foreground, turquoise buttons, sand-wash chart highlights, matrix-brown borders, subtle stone speckle overlays and cracked-vein linework.
Constraints: no ocean, no tropical resort, no jewelry store UI, no neon cyber cyan, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic blue gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Turquoise".
